package rulefixtures

// scenario for type_assertion_without_comma_ok: `v := i.(T)` without the comma-ok form in non-panic-safe code
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule688NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario688Negative(records []Rule688NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
